metadata.description: Reusable agent skills by Luca Silverentand.

plugins.name: collaboration
plugins.description: Collaboration and communication skills for shared understanding: repository docs, decision trees, onboarding context, and human-readable coordination artifacts.

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: Repository management and delivery workflows for commits, pull requests, rebases, conflict resolution, CI repair, PR readiness, stale state cleanup, releases, and getting work safely shipped.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design and architecture skills for product UI, websites, Apple platforms, system architecture, data modeling, API design, technical design docs, ADRs, C4 diagrams, and design reviews.

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Implementation and code craft workflows for skill authoring, reusable tooling, and publishing agent skills as maintained software artifacts.

plugins.name: intent
plugins.description: Intent and problem-understanding workflows for requirements, task shaping, Linear planning, project documents, issue hygiene, and turning vague goals into traceable work.

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Evolution and maintenance workflows for mining agent sessions for durable improvements and encoding long-term user taste into reusable skills.
